overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a medieval coastal town at night. The journey proceeds along torch-lit cobblestone streets, through stone archways, past half-timbered buildings, and along cliffside paths overlooking the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cobblestone walkway with stone parapet and torch lighting

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding a horse along a torch-lit coastal cobblestone path beside a stone wall overlooking the ocean

entered.detail: stone wall with crenellations separating the path from the ocean drop
dark ocean water visible beyond the parapet under the night sky
tall stone tower structure visible in the distance along the coast
burning torch braziers mounted on stone pillars lighting the path
wet cobblestone street reflecting the torchlight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt riding along a narrow coastal cobblestone path at night. A stone parapet wall runs along the left side overlooking the dark ocean, while stone buildings line the right. Torch braziers provide the primary illumination, casting warm light on the wet cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway gatehouse transitioning to town square

events.description: enters stone archway tunnel from open coastal path
exits archway into town with timber-framed buildings

agents.ego_description: riding through the stone gatehouse tunnel and emerging into the town square

notable_agents.action: guard holding a torch near the gate exit

entered.detail: large stone archway tunnel with vaulted ceiling
traditional half-timbered building with dark wooden beams visible through the arch
wooden construction scaffolding against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The horse rides into a stone archway tunnel, temporarily obscuring the sky. Upon exiting, the scene opens into a town square with half-timbered medieval buildings. A guard stands near the exit holding a torch, and wooden scaffolding is visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town street with half-timbered houses and cobblestone roads

events.description: horse turns right at a junction in the town streets

agents.ego_description: navigating through town streets making a right turn at a junction while passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of townspeople walking along the street

entered.detail: yellow and white banner hanging from a building facade
tall cylindrical stone tower rising above the town buildings
stone fountain structure visible in the town square ahead

segments.scene_description: Riding through the town streets surrounded by half-timbered houses, the camera passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The horse makes a right turn at a junction, passing a yellow banner and approaching a town square with a visible fountain and a tall stone tower in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff path with trees overlooking the ocean

events.description: exits the town onto a natural coastal path with trees and ocean views

agents.ego_description: riding along the open coastal path with the ocean visible to the left and trees on the right

entered.detail: large leafy trees lining the right side of the coastal path
open view of the ocean from the cliff edge
massive stone fortress walls becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed town to an open coastal cliff path. Large trees line the right side while the ocean is visible to the left. The path continues toward a massive stone fortress complex, with the cobblestones giving way to a more natural coastal trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone fortress tunnel with portcullis and guard post

events.description: approaches and enters a dark stone tunnel under the fortress
exits the tunnel back to open coastal path

agents.ego_description: riding through the dark stone tunnel beneath the fortress walls

notable_agents.action: guards standing near a campfire at the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: massive stone archway tunnel entrance with thick walls
raised wooden portcullis gate at the tunnel end
burning campfire with guards standing nearby

segments.scene_description: The horse approaches a massive stone fortress and enters a dark tunnel with thick stone walls. Guards stand near a campfire at the entrance. The camera rides through the torch-lit tunnel, passing under a wooden portcullis, before emerging back to the open coastal path.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff settlement with stone watchtower and NPC camp

events.description: passes a group of NPCs gathered around a campfire on the cliffside

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coastal path past a group of NPCs near a campfire, approaching a stone tower

notable_agents.action: group of people in red and white clothing gathered around a campfire
person in red cloak walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: tall stone watchtower with lit windows overlooking the coast
small stone buildings with tiled roofs along the cliff
bright campfire illuminating the NPC gathering
ocean view visible again after exiting the tunnel

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the path continues along the cliff edge past a group of NPCs gathered around a campfire. The ocean is visible again to the left, while stone settlement buildings and a tall watchtower appear ahead. The horse rides past the NPCs and continues toward the tower along the cobblestone cliff path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a torch-lit medieval coastal town that gradually opens into a fortified cliffside settlement. It begins with Geralt riding along a narrow cobblestone path between a stone parapet and dark buildings, before passing through a stone archway that leads into a town square filled with half-timbered houses and pedestrians. As the horse turns through the streets past yellow banners and a distant stone tower, the enclosed urban environment shifts into an open coastal trail lined with large trees and overlooking the ocean. The scene then transitions toward a massive stone fortress, moving through a dark, torch-lit tunnel under a wooden portcullis before emerging back onto the cliff edge. Finally, the camera glides past NPCs gathered around a campfire, continuing along the cobblestone path toward a tall watchtower and the surrounding stone settlement.
